---
title: "Exhaustive List of Quarto YAML Variables"
date: 2026-03-23
format: html
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

## Document Metadata (All Formats)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `title` | Document title |
| `subtitle` | Document subtitle |
| `date` | Document date |
| `date-format` | Date display format |
| `date-modified` | Last modified date (HTML) |
| `author` | Author name(s) |
| `institute` | Author affiliation (Beamer/Revealjs) |
| `abstract` | Document abstract |
| `abstract-title` | Title for abstract section |
| `thanks` | Acknowledgments (PDF/Beamer) |
| `doi` | Digital Object Identifier |
| `order` | Sort order for navigation |
| `keywords` | Document keywords |
| `subject` | Document subject metadata |
| `description` | Document description |
| `description-meta` | HTML meta description |
| `category` | Document categories |
| `copyright` | Copyright info |
| `license` | License info |
| `pagetitle` | Browser tab title (HTML) |
| `title-prefix` | Title prefix (HTML) |
| `author-meta` | HTML meta author |
| `date-meta` | HTML meta date |
| `title-meta` | PDF meta title |

## Format Selection & Engine

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `format` | Output format(s) (html, pdf, docx, etc.) |
| `from` | Input format (markdown variant) |
| `output-file` | Output filename |
| `output-ext` | Output file extension |
| `brand` | Brand YAML file reference |
| `brand-mode` | Brand application mode |
| `quarto-required` | Minimum Quarto version |

## Table of Contents

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `toc` | Enable table of contents |
| `toc-depth` | Heading depth for TOC |
| `toc-title` | TOC title text |
| `toc-location` | TOC placement (HTML: left/right/body) |
| `toc-expand` | Expand depth in sidebar TOC (HTML) |
| `toc-indent` | TOC indentation (Typst) |
| `lof` | List of figures (PDF/Beamer) |
| `lot` | List of tables (PDF/Beamer) |

## Section Numbering

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `number-sections` | Enable section numbering |
| `number-depth` | Depth of numbered sections |
| `number-offset` | Starting offset for numbering |
| `shift-heading-level-by` | Shift heading levels |
| `top-level-division` | Top division type (PDF): chapter/section/part |
| `section-numbering` | Numbering pattern (Typst) |
| `page-numbering` | Page number format (Typst) |

## Fonts & Typography

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `mainfont` | Main body font |
| `sansfont` | Sans-serif font (PDF) |
| `monofont` | Monospace font |
| `mathfont` | Math font (PDF) |
| `fontsize` | Base font size |
| `fontenc` | Font encoding (PDF) |
| `fontfamily` | LaTeX font family (PDF) |
| `fontfamilyoptions` | Font family options (PDF) |
| `mainfontoptions` | Main font options (PDF) |
| `sansfontoptions` | Sans font options (PDF) |
| `monofontoptions` | Mono font options (PDF) |
| `mathfontoptions` | Math font options (PDF) |
| `CJKmainfont` | CJK main font (PDF) |
| `CJKoptions` | CJK font options (PDF) |
| `microtypeoptions` | Microtype options (PDF) |
| `linestretch` | Line spacing multiplier |
| `font-paths` | Font search paths (Typst) |

## Colors

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `fontcolor` | Text color (HTML) |
| `linkcolor` | Link color |
| `filecolor` | File link color (PDF) |
| `citecolor` | Citation link color (PDF) |
| `urlcolor` | URL color (PDF) |
| `toccolor` | TOC link color (PDF) |
| `colorlinks` | Enable colored links (PDF) |
| `monobackgroundcolor` | Code background color (HTML) |
| `backgroundcolor` | Page background color (HTML) |

## Page Layout

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `page-layout` | Page layout mode (HTML: article/full/custom) |
| `grid` | Grid column widths |
| `documentclass` | LaTeX document class (PDF) |
| `classoption` | Document class options |
| `pagestyle` | LaTeX page style (PDF) |
| `papersize` | Paper size (PDF/Typst) |
| `geometry` | Page geometry (PDF) |
| `margin-left` | Left margin |
| `margin-right` | Right margin |
| `margin-top` | Top margin |
| `margin-bottom` | Bottom margin |
| `margin` | All margins (Revealjs/Typst) |
| `max-width` | Maximum content width (HTML) |
| `page-width` | Page width (DOCX/ODT) |
| `hyperrefoptions` | Hyperref package options (PDF) |
| `indent` | Enable paragraph indentation (PDF) |
| `block-headings` | Block-level headings (PDF) |
| `cap-location` | Caption location (top/bottom/margin) |
| `fig-cap-location` | Figure caption location |
| `tbl-cap-location` | Table caption location |

## HTML-Specific Layout & Appearance

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `theme` | Bootstrap theme (HTML/Revealjs/Dashboard) |
| `css` | Custom CSS files |
| `body-classes` | Additional body CSS classes |
| `minimal` | Minimal HTML output |
| `anchor-sections` | Enable anchor links on headings |
| `tabsets` | Enable tabsets |
| `smooth-scroll` | Enable smooth scrolling |
| `respect-user-color-scheme` | Honor system dark/light preference |
| `section-divs` | Wrap sections in div tags |
| `html-q-tags` | Use `<q>` tags for quotes |
| `html-math-method` | Math rendering method (mathjax/katex/etc.) |
| `embed-resources` | Embed all resources in HTML |
| `self-contained-math` | Self-contained math resources |
| `appendix-style` | Appendix display style |
| `appendix-cite-as` | Citation format in appendix |
| `title-block-style` | Title block display style |
| `title-block-banner` | Title block banner image/color |
| `title-block-banner-color` | Banner text color |
| `title-block-categories` | Show categories in title block |
| `image-lazy-loading` | Lazy-load images |

## Code Display

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `code-fold` | Collapse code blocks (HTML) |
| `code-summary` | Summary text for folded code |
| `code-overflow` | Code overflow behavior (scroll/wrap) |
| `code-line-numbers` | Show line numbers |
| `code-copy` | Show copy button (HTML) |
| `code-link` | Link function names to docs (HTML) |
| `code-annotations` | Code annotation style |
| `code-tools` | Show code tools menu (HTML) |
| `code-block-border-left` | Left border on code blocks |
| `code-block-bg` | Code block background |
| `code-block-height` | Max code block height (Revealjs) |
| `highlight-style` | Syntax highlighting theme |
| `syntax-definitions` | Custom syntax definition files |
| `indented-code-classes` | Classes for indented code blocks |
| `listings` | Use LaTeX listings package (PDF) |

## Execution Options

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `eval` | Evaluate code chunks |
| `echo` | Display code in output |
| `output` | Include code output |
| `warning` | Include warnings |
| `error` | Include errors |
| `include` | Include chunk in output |
| `cache` | Cache results |
| `freeze` | Freeze computational output |

## Figures

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `fig-align` | Figure alignment |
| `fig-width` | Default figure width |
| `fig-height` | Default figure height |
| `fig-format` | Figure output format (png/svg/pdf/etc.) |
| `fig-dpi` | Figure DPI resolution |
| `fig-asp` | Figure aspect ratio |
| `fig-responsive` | Responsive figures (HTML) |
| `fig-env` | LaTeX figure environment (PDF) |
| `fig-pos` | LaTeX figure position (PDF) |
| `lightbox` | Enable lightbox for images (HTML) |

## Tables

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `tbl-colwidths` | Table column widths |
| `df-print` | Data frame print method (default/kable/tibble/paged) |
| `html-table-processing` | HTML table processing mode |

## Links

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `link-external-icon` | Show icon for external links (HTML) |
| `link-external-newwindow` | Open external links in new window (HTML) |
| `link-external-filter` | Regex filter for external links (HTML) |
| `format-links` | Show links to other formats (HTML) |
| `notebook-links` | Notebook download links (HTML) |
| `other-links` | Custom sidebar links (HTML) |
| `code-links` | Code download links (HTML) |
| `notebook-view` | Notebook view configuration (HTML) |
| `notebook-preview-options` | Notebook preview options (HTML) |
| `canonical-url` | Canonical URL (HTML) |
| `notebook-subarticles` | Notebook sub-articles (JATS) |

## References & Bibliography

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `bibliography` | Bibliography file(s) |
| `csl` | CSL style file |
| `citeproc` | Enable citeproc processing |
| `cite-method` | Citation method (PDF: citeproc/natbib/biblatex) |
| `citation-abbreviations` | Journal abbreviations file |
| `citation-location` | Citation placement (HTML) |
| `citations-hover` | Hover preview for citations (HTML) |
| `link-citations` | Link citations to bibliography |
| `link-bibliography` | Link bibliography entries to citations |
| `notes-after-punctuation` | Move notes after punctuation |
| `biblatexoptions` | Biblatex options (PDF) |
| `natbiboptions` | Natbib options (PDF) |
| `biblio-style` | Bibliography style (PDF) |
| `biblio-title` | Bibliography section title (PDF) |
| `biblio-config` | Bibliography config (PDF) |
| `bibliographystyle` | Bibliography style (Typst) |

## Footnotes

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `footnotes-hover` | Hover preview for footnotes (HTML) |
| `reference-location` | Footnote/reference placement |
| `links-as-notes` | Render links as footnotes (PDF) |

## Cross-References (`crossref`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `crossref` | Cross-reference options (parent key) |
| `crossrefs-hover` | Hover preview for cross-refs (HTML) |
| `chapters` | Chapter-based numbering |
| `custom` | Custom cross-reference types |
| `title-delim` | Title delimiter |
| `labels` | Default label style (arabic/roman/alpha) |
| `subref-labels` | Sub-reference label style |
| `ref-hyperlink` | Hyperlink cross-references |
| `appendix-title` | Appendix title |
| `appendix-delim` | Appendix delimiter |
| `fig-title` | Figure title prefix |
| `tbl-title` | Table title prefix |
| `eq-title` | Equation title prefix |
| `lst-title` | Listing title prefix |
| `thm-title` | Theorem title prefix |
| `lem-title` | Lemma title prefix |
| `cor-title` | Corollary title prefix |
| `prp-title` | Proposition title prefix |
| `cnj-title` | Conjecture title prefix |
| `def-title` | Definition title prefix |
| `exm-title` | Example title prefix |
| `exr-title` | Exercise title prefix |
| `fig-prefix` | Figure reference prefix |
| `tbl-prefix` | Table reference prefix |
| `eq-prefix` | Equation reference prefix |
| `sec-prefix` | Section reference prefix |
| `lst-prefix` | Listing reference prefix |
| `thm-prefix` | Theorem reference prefix |
| `lem-prefix` | Lemma reference prefix |
| `cor-prefix` | Corollary reference prefix |
| `prp-prefix` | Proposition reference prefix |
| `cnj-prefix` | Conjecture reference prefix |
| `def-prefix` | Definition reference prefix |
| `exm-prefix` | Example reference prefix |
| `exr-prefix` | Exercise reference prefix |
| `fig-labels` | Figure label style |
| `tbl-labels` | Table label style |
| `eq-labels` | Equation label style |
| `sec-labels` | Section label style |
| `lst-labels` | Listing label style |
| `thm-labels` | Theorem label style |
| `lem-labels` | Lemma label style |
| `cor-labels` | Corollary label style |
| `prp-labels` | Proposition label style |
| `cnj-labels` | Conjecture label style |
| `def-labels` | Definition label style |
| `exm-labels` | Example label style |
| `exr-labels` | Exercise label style |
| `lof-title` | List of figures title |
| `lot-title` | List of tables title |
| `lol-title` | List of listings title |

### Custom Cross-Reference Type

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `kind` | float or non-float |
| `reference-prefix` | Prefix in references |
| `caption-prefix` | Prefix in captions |
| `space-before-numbering` | Space before number |
| `key` | Short key identifier |
| `latex-env` | LaTeX environment name |
| `latex-list-of-file-extension` | LaTeX list-of extension |
| `latex-list-of-description` | LaTeX list-of description |
| `caption-location` | Caption position |

## Citation Metadata (`citation`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `citation` | Citation metadata (parent key) |
| `id` | Citation ID |
| `type` | Citation type |
| `url` | Citation URL |
| `title` | Citation title |
| `author` | Citation author(s) |
| `doi` | Citation DOI |
| `issued` | Issue date |
| `abstract` | Citable abstract |
| `abstract-url` | Abstract URL |
| `accessed` | Date accessed |
| `annote` | Annotation |
| `archive` | Archive name |
| `archive-collection` | Archive collection |
| `archive-location` | Archive location |
| `archive-place` | Archive place |
| `authority` | Authority |
| `available-date` | Availability date |
| `call-number` | Call number |
| `chair` | Chair |
| `chapter-number` | Chapter number |
| `citation-key` | Citation key |
| `citation-label` | Citation label |
| `collection-editor` | Collection editor |
| `collection-number` | Collection number |
| `collection-title` | Collection title |
| `compiler` | Compiler |
| `composer` | Composer |
| `container-author` | Container author |
| `container-title` | Container title |
| `contributor` | Contributor |
| `curator` | Curator |
| `dimensions` | Dimensions |
| `director` | Director |
| `division` | Division |
| `edition` | Edition |
| `editor` | Editor |
| `editorial-director` | Editorial director |
| `editor-translator` | Editor-translator |
| `event-date` | Event date |
| `event-title` | Event title |
| `event-place` | Event place |
| `executive-producer` | Executive producer |
| `fulltext-url` | Full text URL |
| `genre` | Genre |
| `guest` | Guest |
| `host` | Host |
| `illustrator` | Illustrator |
| `interviewer` | Interviewer |
| `isbn` | ISBN |
| `issn` | ISSN |
| `issue` | Issue number |
| `jurisdiction` | Jurisdiction |
| `keyword` | Keyword |
| `language` | Language |
| `license` | License |
| `locator` | Locator |
| `medium` | Medium |
| `narrator` | Narrator |
| `note` | Note |
| `number` | Number |
| `number-of-pages` | Number of pages |
| `number-of-volumes` | Number of volumes |
| `organizer` | Organizer |
| `original-author` | Original author |
| `original-date` | Original date |
| `original-publisher` | Original publisher |
| `original-publisher-place` | Original publisher place |
| `original-title` | Original title |
| `page` | Page range |
| `page-first` | First page |
| `page-last` | Last page |
| `part-number` | Part number |
| `part-title` | Part title |
| `pdf-url` | PDF URL |
| `performer` | Performer |
| `pmcid` | PubMed Central ID |
| `pmid` | PubMed ID |
| `printing-number` | Printing number |
| `producer` | Producer |
| `public-url` | Public URL |
| `publisher` | Publisher |
| `publisher-place` | Publisher place |
| `recipient` | Recipient |
| `reviewed-author` | Reviewed author |
| `reviewed-genre` | Reviewed genre |
| `reviewed-title` | Reviewed title |
| `scale` | Scale |
| `script-writer` | Script writer |
| `section` | Section |
| `series-creator` | Series creator |
| `source` | Source |
| `status` | Status |
| `submitted` | Date submitted |
| `supplement-number` | Supplement number |
| `translator` | Translator |
| `version` | Version |
| `volume` | Volume |
| `volume-title` | Volume title |
| `year-suffix` | Year suffix |

## Language & Localization

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `lang` | Document language (BCP 47) |
| `language` | Custom language translations file |
| `dir` | Text direction (ltr/rtl) |

## Includes & Resources

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `include-before-body` | Content before body |
| `include-after-body` | Content after body |
| `include-in-header` | Content in header |
| `resources` | Additional resource files |
| `metadata-files` | Additional metadata YAML files |
| `template` | Custom Pandoc template |
| `template-partials` | Template partial overrides |

## Rendering & Processing

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `filters` | Pandoc/Lua filters |
| `shortcodes` | Shortcode extensions |
| `keep-md` | Keep intermediate markdown |
| `keep-ipynb` | Keep intermediate notebook |
| `keep-tex` | Keep intermediate LaTeX (PDF) |
| `keep-typ` | Keep intermediate Typst source |
| `ipynb-filters` | Notebook filters |
| `ipynb-shell-interactivity` | IPython shell interactivity |
| `plotly-connected` | Use connected Plotly.js |
| `extract-media` | Extract media directory |
| `resource-path` | Resource search path |
| `default-image-extension` | Default image file extension |
| `abbreviations` | Abbreviation definitions |
| `dpi` | Default DPI |
| `identifier-prefix` | ID prefix for elements |
| `email-obfuscation` | Email obfuscation method |
| `html-pre-tag-processing` | HTML pre tag processing (Typst) |
| `css-property-processing` | CSS property processing (Typst) |
| `use-rsvg-convert` | Use rsvg-convert for SVGs (PDF) |

## PDF/LaTeX-Specific

### PDF Engine

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `pdf-engine` | LaTeX engine (pdflatex/xelatex/lualatex/tectonic) |
| `pdf-engine-opt` | Single engine option |
| `pdf-engine-opts` | Multiple engine options |

### Latexmk Options

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `latex-auto-mk` | Auto-run latexmk |
| `latex-auto-install` | Auto-install missing packages |
| `latex-min-runs` | Minimum LaTeX runs |
| `latex-max-runs` | Maximum LaTeX runs |
| `latex-clean` | Clean auxiliary files |
| `latex-makeindex` | Makeindex program |
| `latex-makeindex-opts` | Makeindex options |
| `latex-tlmgr-opts` | tlmgr options |
| `latex-output-dir` | LaTeX output directory |
| `latex-tinytex` | Use TinyTeX |
| `latex-input-paths` | Additional TeX input paths |
| `beamerarticle` | Beamer article mode |

## Reveal.js Presentation-Specific

### Slides

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `incremental` | Incremental bullet points |
| `slide-level` | Heading level for slides |
| `slide-number` | Slide number format |
| `show-slide-number` | When to show slide numbers |
| `title-slide-attributes` | Title slide HTML attributes |
| `title-slide-style` | Title slide style |
| `center-title-slide` | Center title slide content |
| `show-notes` | Show speaker notes |
| `rtl` | Right-to-left mode |

### Slide Content

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `logo` | Slide logo image |
| `footer` | Slide footer text |
| `scrollable` | Enable scrolling |
| `smaller` | Smaller text |
| `output-location` | Output placement |

### Slide Tools

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `overview` | Enable overview mode |
| `menu` | Enable menu plugin |
| `chalkboard` | Enable chalkboard plugin |
| `multiplex` | Enable multiplex plugin |
| `scroll-view` | Enable scroll view |

### Transitions

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `transition` | Slide transition style |
| `transition-speed` | Transition speed |
| `background-transition` | Background transition |
| `fragments` | Enable fragments |
| `auto-animate` | Auto-animate between slides |
| `auto-animate-easing` | Animation easing |
| `auto-animate-duration` | Animation duration |
| `auto-animate-unmatched` | Animate unmatched elements |
| `auto-animate-styles` | CSS properties to animate |

### Navigation

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `progress` | Show progress bar |
| `history` | Push slide changes to browser history |
| `navigation-mode` | Navigation mode (default/linear/grid) |
| `touch` | Enable touch navigation |
| `keyboard` | Enable keyboard shortcuts |
| `mouse-wheel` | Enable mouse wheel navigation |
| `hide-inactive-cursor` | Hide cursor when inactive |
| `hide-cursor-time` | Time before cursor hides |
| `loop` | Loop presentation |
| `shuffle` | Randomize slide order |
| `controls` | Show navigation controls |
| `controls-layout` | Controls position |
| `controls-tutorial` | Show controls tutorial |
| `controls-back-arrows` | Back arrow visibility |
| `auto-slide` | Auto-advance interval (ms) |
| `auto-slide-stoppable` | Allow stopping auto-slide |
| `auto-slide-method` | Auto-slide method |
| `default-timing` | Default timing per slide |
| `pause` | Enable pause key |
| `help` | Enable help overlay |
| `hash` | Enable URL hashing |
| `hash-type` | Hash type (number/title) |
| `hash-one-based-index` | One-based hash index |
| `respond-to-hash-changes` | Respond to URL hash changes |
| `fragment-in-url` | Include fragments in URL |
| `slide-tone` | Audio tone on slide change |
| `jump-to-slide` | Enable jump-to-slide |

### Media

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `preview-links` | Preview links in iframe |
| `auto-play-media` | Auto-play media |
| `preload-iframes` | Preload iframes |
| `view-distance` | Preload distance |
| `mobile-view-distance` | Mobile preload distance |
| `parallax-background-image` | Parallax background image |
| `parallax-background-size` | Parallax background size |
| `parallax-background-horizontal` | Horizontal parallax pixels |
| `parallax-background-vertical` | Vertical parallax pixels |

### Print to PDF

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `pdf-max-pages-per-slide` | Max pages per slide |
| `pdf-separate-fragments` | Separate fragments to pages |
| `pdf-page-height-offset` | Page height offset |

### Slide Layout

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `auto-stretch` | Auto-stretch images |
| `width` | Slide width |
| `height` | Slide height |
| `min-scale` | Minimum scale |
| `max-scale` | Maximum scale |
| `center` | Center slide content |
| `disable-layout` | Disable layout engine |
| `revealjs-url` | Custom Reveal.js library URL |

## Beamer Presentation-Specific

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `theme` | Beamer theme |
| `colortheme` | Color theme |
| `colorthemeoptions` | Color theme options |
| `fonttheme` | Font theme |
| `fontthemeoptions` | Font theme options |
| `innertheme` | Inner theme |
| `innerthemeoptions` | Inner theme options |
| `outertheme` | Outer theme |
| `outerthemeoptions` | Outer theme options |
| `themeoptions` | General theme options |
| `beameroption` | Beamer options |
| `aspectratio` | Aspect ratio |
| `logo` | Logo image |
| `titlegraphic` | Title graphic |
| `navigation` | Navigation symbols |
| `section-titles` | Section title slides |

## Dashboard-Specific

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `logo` | Dashboard logo |
| `orientation` | Layout direction (rows/columns) |
| `scrolling` | Enable scrolling |
| `expandable` | Cards expandable to full-screen |
| `nav-buttons` | Navigation buttons |

## ePub-Specific

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `identifier` | Publication identifier |
| `creator` | Creator metadata |
| `contributor` | Contributor metadata |
| `subject` | Subject metadata |
| `type` | Publication type |
| `format` | ePub format |
| `relation` | Related works |
| `coverage` | Coverage scope |
| `rights` | Rights statement |
| `belongs-to-collection` | Collection membership |
| `group-position` | Position in collection |
| `page-progression-direction` | Page direction (ltr/rtl) |
| `ibooks` | iBooks-specific metadata |
| `epub-metadata` | Additional ePub metadata file |
| `epub-subdirectory` | Content subdirectory |
| `epub-fonts` | Embedded fonts |
| `epub-chapter-level` | Chapter split level |
| `epub-cover-image` | Cover image |
| `epub-title-page` | Include title page |
| `split-level` | Section split level |

## DOCX/ODT/PPTX-Specific

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `reference-doc` | Reference document template |

## JATS-Specific

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `affiliation` | Author affiliations |
| `article` | Article metadata |
| `journal` | Journal metadata |
| `notes` | Article notes |
| `tags` | Article tags |
| `preview-mode` | Preview rendering mode |

## Text Output Options (Markdown/Plain Formats)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `wrap` | Line wrapping mode (auto/none/preserve) |
| `columns` | Column width for wrapping |
| `tab-stop` | Tab stop width |
| `preserve-tabs` | Preserve tab characters |
| `eol` | End-of-line character |
| `strip-comments` | Strip HTML comments |
| `ascii` | ASCII-only output |
| `variant` | Markdown variant |
| `markdown-headings` | Heading style (atx/setext) |

## Project Configuration (`_quarto.yml` --- `project`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `project.title` | Project title |
| `project.type` | Project type (website/book/manuscript/default) |
| `project.render` | Files to render |
| `project.execute-dir` | Execution working directory |
| `project.output-dir` | Output directory |
| `project.lib-dir` | Library directory |
| `project.resources` | Additional resources |
| `project.brand` | Project-level brand |
| `project.pre-render` | Pre-render scripts |
| `project.post-render` | Post-render scripts |

### Preview (`project.preview`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `port` | Preview server port |
| `host` | Preview server host |
| `browser` | Open browser on preview |
| `watch-inputs` | Watch input files |
| `navigate` | Auto-navigate on render |
| `timeout` | Preview timeout |

### Serve (`project.preview.serve`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `cmd` | Server command |
| `args` | Server arguments |
| `env` | Environment variables |
| `ready` | Ready signal pattern |

## Website Configuration (`website`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `website.title` | Site title |
| `website.description` | Site description |
| `website.favicon` | Favicon path |
| `website.site-url` | Base URL |
| `website.site-path` | Base path |
| `website.repo-url` | Source repo URL |
| `website.repo-link-target` | Repo link target |
| `website.repo-link-rel` | Repo link rel attribute |
| `website.repo-subdir` | Repo subdirectory |
| `website.repo-branch` | Repo branch name |
| `website.issue-url` | Issue tracker URL |
| `website.repo-actions` | Repo action links (edit/source/issue) |
| `website.reader-mode` | Enable reader mode |
| `website.google-analytics` | GA tracking ID |
| `website.image` | Default social image |
| `website.image-alt` | Default social image alt |
| `website.page-navigation` | Enable prev/next navigation |
| `website.back-to-top-navigation` | Back-to-top button |
| `website.bread-crumbs` | Enable breadcrumbs |
| `website.body-header` | Body header content |
| `website.body-footer` | Body footer content |
| `website.margin-header` | Margin header content |
| `website.margin-footer` | Margin footer content |
| `website.drafts` | Draft documents list |
| `website.draft-mode` | How to handle drafts |

### Announcement (`website.announcement`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `content` | Announcement text |
| `dismissable` | Can be dismissed |
| `icon` | Icon |
| `position` | Position (above-navbar/below-navbar) |
| `type` | Style type |

### Navbar (`website.navbar`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `title` | Navbar title |
| `logo` | Logo image |
| `logo-alt` | Logo alt text |
| `logo-href` | Logo link URL |
| `background` | Navbar background color |
| `foreground` | Navbar foreground color |
| `search` | Show search |
| `pinned` | Pin to top |
| `collapse` | Enable collapse on mobile |
| `collapse-below` | Collapse breakpoint |
| `left` | Left-aligned nav items |
| `right` | Right-aligned nav items |
| `toggle-position` | Mobile toggle position |
| `tools-collapse` | Collapse tools on mobile |

### Nav Items

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `text` | Display text |
| `href` | Link URL |
| `icon` | Bootstrap icon |
| `menu` | Dropdown menu items |
| `aria-label` | Accessibility label |
| `rel` | Link rel attribute |
| `target` | Link target attribute |

### Sidebar (`website.sidebar`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `id` | Sidebar identifier |
| `title` | Sidebar title |
| `logo` | Logo image |
| `logo-alt` | Logo alt text |
| `logo-href` | Logo link URL |
| `search` | Show search |
| `tools` | Sidebar tools |
| `contents` | Navigation items |
| `style` | Style (docked/floating) |
| `background` | Background color |
| `foreground` | Foreground color |
| `border` | Show border |
| `alignment` | Content alignment |
| `collapse-level` | Auto-collapse depth |
| `pinned` | Pin sidebar |
| `header` | Header content |
| `footer` | Footer content |

### Page Footer (`website.page-footer`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `left` | Left content |
| `right` | Right content |
| `center` | Center content |
| `border` | Show border |
| `background` | Background color |
| `foreground` | Foreground color |

### Search (`website.search`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `location` | Search location |
| `type` | Search type (overlay/textbox) |
| `limit` | Max results |
| `collapse-after` | Collapse results threshold |
| `copy-button` | Show copy button |
| `merge-navbar-crumbs` | Merge breadcrumbs |
| `keyboard-shortcut` | Keyboard shortcut |
| `show-item-context` | Show result context |

### Algolia (`website.search.algolia`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `index-name` | Algolia index |
| `application-id` | App ID |
| `search-only-api-key` | API key |
| `analytics-events` | Track analytics |
| `show-logo` | Show Algolia logo |
| `index-fields` | Field mapping (href/title/text/section) |
| `params` | Additional parameters |

### Open Graph (`website.open-graph`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `title` | OG title |
| `description` | OG description |
| `image` | OG image |
| `image-alt` | OG image alt text |
| `image-width` | OG image width |
| `image-height` | OG image height |
| `locale` | OG locale |
| `site-name` | OG site name |

### Twitter Card (`website.twitter-card`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `title` | Card title |
| `description` | Card description |
| `image` | Card image |
| `image-alt` | Card image alt text |
| `image-width` | Card image width |
| `image-height` | Card image height |
| `card-style` | Card type (summary/summary_large_image) |
| `creator` | Twitter handle |
| `site` | Site Twitter handle |

### Comments: Hypothesis (`website.comments.hypothesis`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `openSidebar` | Open sidebar on load |
| `showHighlights` | Show highlights |
| `theme` | Widget theme |
| `enableExperimentalNewNoteButton` | New note button |
| `usernameUrl` | Username URL |
| `services` | Services configuration |
| `branding` | Branding options |
| `externalContainerSelector` | External container selector |
| `focus` | Focus user |
| `requestConfigFromFrame` | Frame config |
| `assetRoot` | Asset root URL |
| `sidebarAppUrl` | Sidebar app URL |

### Comments: Utterances (`website.comments.utterances`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `repo` | GitHub repo |
| `label` | Issue label |
| `theme` | Widget theme |
| `issue-term` | Issue matching term |

### Comments: Giscus (`website.comments.giscus`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `repo` | GitHub repo |
| `repo-id` | GitHub repo ID |
| `category` | Discussion category |
| `category-id` | Discussion category ID |
| `mapping` | Discussion mapping |
| `reactions-enabled` | Enable reactions |
| `loading` | Loading mode (lazy) |
| `input-position` | Input position |
| `theme` | Widget theme |
| `language` | Widget language |

### Listings (Page-Level `listing`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `id` | Listing identifier |
| `type` | Listing type (default/grid/table) |
| `contents` | Content source |
| `sort` | Sort field and order |
| `max-items` | Maximum items to display |
| `page-size` | Items per page |
| `sort-ui` | Show sort controls |
| `filter-ui` | Show filter controls |
| `categories` | Show category filter |
| `feed` | RSS feed configuration |
| `date-format` | Date display format |
| `max-description-length` | Description truncation length |
| `image-placeholder` | Placeholder image |
| `image-lazy-loading` | Lazy-load images |
| `image-align` | Image alignment |
| `image-height` | Image height |
| `grid-columns` | Number of grid columns |
| `grid-item-border` | Grid item border |
| `grid-item-align` | Grid item alignment |
| `table-striped` | Striped table rows |
| `table-hover` | Table hover effect |
| `template` | Custom EJS template |
| `template-params` | Template parameters |
| `fields` | Fields to display |
| `field-display-names` | Field display names |
| `field-types` | Field types |
| `field-links` | Field link targets |
| `field-required` | Required fields |
| `include` | Include filter |
| `exclude` | Exclude filter |

### Listing Feed (`listing.feed`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `items` | Number of feed items |
| `type` | Feed type (full/partial) |
| `title` | Feed title |
| `image` | Feed image |
| `description` | Feed description |
| `language` | Feed language |
| `categories` | Feed categories |
| `xml-stylesheet` | Custom XML stylesheet |

### About Pages (`about`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `id` | About page ID |
| `template` | Template (jolla/trestles/solana/marquee/broadside) |
| `image` | Profile image |
| `image-alt` | Image alt text |
| `image-title` | Image title |
| `image-width` | Image width |
| `image-shape` | Image shape (circle/rounded/rectangle) |
| `links` | Social/contact links |

## Book Configuration (`book`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `book.title` | Book title |
| `book.subtitle` | Book subtitle |
| `book.author` | Book author(s) |
| `book.date` | Publication date |
| `book.date-format` | Date format |
| `book.abstract` | Book abstract |
| `book.description` | Book description |
| `book.references` | Bibliography file |
| `book.output-file` | Combined output filename |
| `book.cover-image` | Cover image |
| `book.cover-image-alt` | Cover image alt text |
| `book.sharing` | Social sharing buttons |
| `book.downloads` | Download format links |
| `book.tools` | Book tools |
| `book.doi` | Book DOI |
| `book.chapters` | Chapter list |
| `book.appendices` | Appendix list |
| `book.parts` | Book parts |

Book projects also inherit all `website.*` variables for navbar, sidebar, footer, search, comments, etc.

## Manuscript Configuration (`manuscript`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `manuscript.article` | Main article file |
| `manuscript.code-links` | Code repository links |
| `manuscript.manuscript-url` | Published manuscript URL |
| `manuscript.meca-bundle` | Generate MECA bundle |
| `manuscript.notebooks` | Supplementary notebooks |
| `manuscript.resources` | Additional resources |
| `manuscript.environment` | Computational environment |

## Brand Configuration (`_brand.yml`)

### Meta

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `meta.name` | Brand name |
| `meta.link` | Brand link |

### Logo

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `logo.images` | Logo image definitions |
| `logo.small` | Small logo |
| `logo.medium` | Medium logo |
| `logo.large` | Large logo |

### Color (`color`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `palette` | Named color palette |
| `foreground` | Base foreground color |
| `background` | Base background color |
| `primary` | Primary theme color |
| `secondary` | Secondary theme color |
| `tertiary` | Tertiary theme color |
| `success` | Success color |
| `info` | Info color |
| `warning` | Warning color |
| `danger` | Danger color |
| `light` | Light color |
| `dark` | Dark color |
| `link` | Link color |

### Typography (`typography`)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `fonts` | Font resource definitions |
| `base` | Base text: `family`, `size`, `weight`, `line-height` |
| `headings` | Headings: `family`, `weight`, `style`, `color`, `line-height` |
| `monospace` | Monospace: `family`, `size`, `weight`, `color`, `background-color` |
| `monospace-inline` | Inline code typography |
| `monospace-block` | Code block typography (+ `line-height`) |
| `link` | Link: `weight`, `color`, `background-color`, `decoration` |

### Font Sources

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `source` | Font source (google/bunny/file/system) |
| `family` | Font family name |
| `weight` | Font weight(s) |
| `style` | Font style(s) |
| `display` | Font display strategy |
| `files` | Local font file paths (file source) |

## Cell-Level Options: Jupyter

### Attributes

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `label` | Cell label |
| `classes` | CSS classes |
| `renderings` | Rendering targets |
| `tags` | Cell tags |
| `id` | Cell ID |

### Code Output

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `eval` | Evaluate cell |
| `echo` | Display source code |
| `code-fold` | Fold code |
| `code-summary` | Fold summary text |
| `code-overflow` | Overflow behavior |
| `code-line-numbers` | Line numbers |
| `lst-label` | Listing label |
| `lst-cap` | Listing caption |

### Cell Output

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `output` | Include output |
| `warning` | Include warnings |
| `error` | Include errors |
| `include` | Include cell |
| `panel` | Panel placement |
| `output-location` | Output location |

### Figures

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `fig-cap` | Figure caption |
| `fig-subcap` | Sub-figure captions |
| `fig-link` | Figure link |
| `fig-align` | Figure alignment |
| `fig-alt` | Figure alt text |
| `fig-env` | LaTeX figure environment |
| `fig-pos` | LaTeX figure position |
| `fig-scap` | Short caption (PDF) |

### Tables

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `tbl-cap` | Table caption |
| `tbl-subcap` | Sub-table captions |
| `tbl-colwidths` | Column widths |
| `html-table-processing` | Table processing mode |

### Panel Layout

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `layout` | Custom layout specification |
| `layout-ncol` | Number of columns |
| `layout-nrow` | Number of rows |
| `layout-align` | Layout alignment |
| `layout-valign` | Layout vertical alignment |

### Page Columns

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `column` | Page column placement |
| `fig-column` | Figure column |
| `tbl-column` | Table column |
| `cap-location` | Caption location |
| `fig-cap-location` | Figure caption location |
| `tbl-cap-location` | Table caption location |

## Cell-Level Options: Knitr (Additional)

### Code Output (Extra)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `tidy` | Tidy R code |
| `tidy-opts` | Tidy options |
| `collapse` | Collapse output into code block |
| `prompt` | Show R prompt |
| `class-source` | Source block CSS class |
| `attr-source` | Source block attributes |

### Cell Output (Extra)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `message` | Include messages |
| `results` | Output handling (markup/asis/hold/hide) |
| `comment` | Output comment prefix |
| `class-output` | Output block CSS class |
| `attr-output` | Output block attributes |
| `class-warning` | Warning block CSS class |
| `attr-warning` | Warning block attributes |
| `class-message` | Message block CSS class |
| `attr-message` | Message block attributes |
| `class-error` | Error block CSS class |
| `attr-error` | Error block attributes |

### Figures (Extra)

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `fig-width` | Figure width (inches) |
| `fig-height` | Figure height (inches) |
| `fig-format` | Output format (png/svg/pdf) |
| `fig-dpi` | DPI resolution |
| `fig-asp` | Aspect ratio |
| `out-width` | Output width (CSS/LaTeX) |
| `out-height` | Output height (CSS/LaTeX) |
| `fig-keep` | Which figures to keep |
| `fig-show` | How to show figures |
| `out-extra` | Extra output attributes |
| `external` | Tikz external mode |
| `sanitize` | Sanitize SVG output |
| `interval` | Animation interval |
| `aniopts` | Animation options |
| `animation-hook` | Animation hook |

### Cache

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `cache` | Enable caching |
| `cache-vars` | Variables to cache |
| `cache-globals` | Global variables for cache key |
| `cache-lazy` | Lazy-load cached objects |
| `cache-rebuild` | Force cache rebuild |
| `cache-comments` | Include comments in cache key |
| `dependson` | Cache dependencies |
| `autodep` | Automatic dependency detection |

### Include

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `child` | Child document |
| `file` | External code file |
| `code` | Inline code string |
| `purl` | Include in tangled script |

## Cell-Level Options: Observable JS

Same as Jupyter cell options except: no `tags` or `id` attributes, and no `tbl-colwidths` in the tables section.
